errors.description: Auditor bundle checkpoint summary is missing, malformed, or not hash-bound.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until checkpoint evidence is canonical

errors.description: Auditor bundle inclusion proof summary is missing, malformed, or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until inclusion evidence is canonical

errors.description: Auditor bundle consistency proof summary is missing, malformed, or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until consistency evidence is canonical

errors.description: Auditor bundle verification scope or timestamp is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until scope is explicit and deterministic

errors.description: Auditor bundle hash or cross-proof hash binding does not match.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until all proof summaries bind to the same checkpoint

errors.description: Auditor bundle identifier was already observed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until replay risk is resolved

errors.description: Auditor bundle contains sensitive or unredacted diagnostic material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny portable audit verification until diagnostics are redacted
